titleStmt.title: SII 15.49: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 49. (B.K. No. 212 of 1928-29.) ĀRĒKURAHAṬṬI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Hanumantadēva temple.
This is dated the 6th regnal year of the king, Bhāva, Pushya ba. 4, Vaḍḍavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, corresponding to 1154 A.D., December 25.

It records the gift of income derived from cess of various commodities to the god Gavaṟēśvara made by Mummuridaṇḍa and Aivattokkalu of Hiriya Kuṟihaṭṭi which was a sarvanamasyada agrahāra created by Tribhuvanamalla (Vikramāditya VI). The epigraph is much damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged
cāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē .
ḷakūṭa
diṁ sama
stabhuvanāśraya rājā
dhirāja paramēśvara satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷaka cā traiḷōkyama
lladēvara vijaya
damaged
saṁstutaru viprōttamarenikuṁ rvvige pūjya
ra . bēḍidaḍartthige kuḍuva doḷu baṁdu
nāḍūḷa
ya . svasti yamaniyamasvā
dhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭāṇa japa samā
dhi śīḷaguṇasaṁpaṁna kōpā
vatāpūjātatpararuṁ mārttaṇḍa ḷa kīrttiyu
taraśēṣavidyāviśāradaruṁ svadharmmapratipālanaradha
rmmaparihāraruṁ śāpānugrahasamarttharumappa śrī
tribhuvanamalladēvara nityadānada brahmapuri sarvva na
masyadagrahāra hiriya kuṟihaṭṭiya śrīmadaśē
ṣa mahājanaṁgaḷa saṁnidhānadalu śrīmattrailōkya
malladēvavarṣada 6 neya bhāva saṁvatsarada puṣya
bahuḷavaḍḍavāradaṁduttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa
daṁdalliya taḷasamasta mummuridaṁḍamayvattokka
lumirddu gavaṟēśvaradēvariga biṭṭadharmmamaṁteṁdaḍe grā
madalu huṭṭidāyada baḷiyalu hoṁgare vīsa
hasuṁbeyikkida nālku gō gehaṇa . dēvaṁ
ga . jja Aṁgaḍiyalli saṁtata saṭṭuga bhatta . gā
ṇadalli soṁṭige yaṇne . hēṟigayvatu hēṟiṁge nū
rele caitra pavitradalu hēṟu vokkaliṁga gava
rataṁbuligaralli hāga © śrīmēdimarasarājñeyi
namātupajīviyappa gōviṁdarasaṁ sōmārkka
ruḷḷinaṁ nile taṁmokkalu dharayoḷoṁdanoldudanitta .
śrīgavaṟēśvaradēvara bhōgakkida nāgamarasa pēḷdaḍe pu
ṇyakkāgaramene bharateṇa koṭṭaṁ gollara bīravaṇama
noṁdokkala . merevuge kāvaridirccidoḍiṟivaru
bēḍidaḍe kuḍuvaru lamaṁ meṟevaru ballidareṁba�
du kuṟihaṭṭiya taḷada seṭṭiguttarddhareyoḷu . Ēnaṁ pē
ḷvudu peṁpinoḷu jaḷadhigaḷa tavaṁgaṁtakarddāna kalpa
kujāte mananikuṁ dharmma doṁdāśraya sā
kṣameyoḷu dharitrigeṇe śauryyaṁ
riṁ nānaynūrvvara The rest of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 15.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
